summary: Removed dead variable `let revParseCount = 0;` from the test and added three new tests under 'runSimplifyPass — full branch diff (not per-task)' that explicitly verify: (1) the merge-base command references main or master, (2) the resulting SHA is used as the diff range start (merge-base..HEAD), and (3) the master fallback works when main is unavailable. All 588 tests pass.
